chapter_title.en: Chapter on Those Who Abandon Zakat Despite it Being Obligatory Upon Them

text: 1596 - وَ رَوَى مَرْوَانُ بْنُ مُسْلِمٍ عَنْ عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ بْنِ هِلاَلٍ قَالَ سَمِعْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ يَقُولُ: «تَارِكُ اَلزَّكَاةِ وَ قَدْ وَجَبَتْ لَهُ مِثْلُ مَانِعِهَا وَ قَدْ وَجَبَتْ عَلَيْهِ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.1596 - Marwan ibn Muslim reported from Abdullah ibn Hilal, who said:
I heard Abu Abdullah Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) say:
"The one who neglects Zakat after it has become obligatory upon him is like the one who withholds it after it has become due."
